Operation 'submitPulse' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Submit pulse' is too generic and doesn't convey the domain purpose (XP tracking). Description lacks critical details: authentication requirement (API token), input schema details (PulseRequest structure), output information (PulseResponse contents), and side effects (updates user XP and statistics). Enhanced version clarifies the action's purpose, authentication, input/output schemas, and state changes for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Submit a new pulse containing programming activity data (XP) for one or more languages
data.summary_suggestion: Submit programming activity data for XP tracking
data.description_suggestion: Submit a new pulse to record programming activity and earn XP across one or more languages. Requires API token authentication. Accepts a PulseRequest containing language-specific XP data. Returns a PulseResponse confirming successful submission and updated XP totals. This operation updates the authenticated user's cumulative XP and language statistics.
